user.title: Connect your Veton charger
user.description: Enter the connection details for your Veton EV charger (Phoenix Contact CHARX controller). The charger must be reachable over Modbus/TCP on your local network.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure your Veton charger
reconfigure.description: Update the connection details for your Veton EV charger.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the charger. Check the IP address, make sure the Modbus TCP port (default 502) is reachable, and that the controller is powered on.

abort.already_configured: This charger connector is already configured.
abort.reconfigure_successful: The charger connection was updated successfully.
